# WCNegentropy

> A negentropic attractor — deep-tech IP holding company and research lab building unified field theories, magnetic dynamics frameworks, deterministic code generators, and novel AI architectures.

## About

WCNEGENTROPY HOLDINGS LLC is a Delaware holdco focused on deep-tech research and open-source software. We publish theoretical physics frameworks, computational tools, and experimental AI models under split licenses (CC BY 4.0 for research, AGPLv3 for software, MIT for developer tools).

## Research

### MAGUFT — Magnetic Rotation Grand Unified Field Theory
- URL: https://github.com/WCNegentropy/MAGUFT
- Description: A unified theoretical framework modeling quantum mechanics and general relativity as orthogonal projections of a single entropy-driven master equation on the metric-valued density field Φ^{ab} = √ρ g^{ab}. Includes Papers 1-3, SymPy symbolic derivation pipeline, and computational experiments.
- License: CC BY 4.0 (Research) / AGPLv3 (Software)

### MagRot — Rotational-Vector Framework for Magnetic Field Dynamics
- URL: https://github.com/WCNegentropy/magrot
- Description: Dimensionless rotational parameter R(x) encoding local tendency toward collapse, expansion, or equilibrium in magnetic field configurations. Validated against Z-pinch, tokamak (ITER-scale), and Earth dipole. v2 entropy-parameterized state flow framework.
- License: AGPLv3 (Software) / CC BY 4.0 (Research)

## Software

### retro-vibecoder (Universal Project Generator)
- URL: https://github.com/WCNegentropy/retro-vibecoder
- NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@wcnegentropy/cli
- Description: CLI tool and cross-platform Tauri desktop app that procedurally generates full working boilerplate tech stacks and projects from a single deterministic seed. 40+ generation strategies, 7 archetypes, 12 languages. MIT licensed.
- Install: npm install -g @wcnegentropy/cli

## AI Models (HuggingFace)

### BitTransformerLM
- URL: https://huggingface.co/WCNegentropy/BitTransformerLM
- Description: Experimental bit-level transformer with 9-bit encoding (8 data + 1 parity). Novel reversible architecture with built-in safety telemetry. 793K-771M parameters. AGPLv3.

### WrinkleBrane
- URL: https://huggingface.co/WCNegentropy/WrinkleBrane
- Description: Experimental wave-interference memory system using 4D tensor operations. High-precision associative memory with parallel retrieval (150+ dB PSNR). AGPL-3.0.

## Links

- Website: https://wcnegentropy.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/WCNegentropy
- HuggingFace: https://huggingface.co/WCNegentropy
- X/Twitter: https://twitter.com/WCNegentropy
- NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@wcnegentropy/cli
- Email: contact@wcnegentropy.com

## Commercial Licensing

AGPLv3-licensed software requires derivative works and network services to be open-sourced. For proprietary/closed-source commercial use, contact contact@wcnegentropy.com for a commercial license.
